name: ai-intel-hub
description: AI Intelligence Hub - Personalized AI feed aggregation, analysis, and curation

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cp -n backend/.env.example backend/.env 2>/dev/null; echo 'Setup complete. Edit backend/.env to add your Anthropic API key.'
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --kill-others "cd frontend && npm run dev" "sleep 2 && NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && hdiutil detach '/Volumes/AI Intelligence Hub' 2>/dev/null; electron-builder --mac --arm64 && hdiutil detach '/Volumes/AI Intelligence Hub' 2>/dev/null; electron-builder --mac --x64
